scope.question: Create the first retained ClinicalTrials.gov registry text snapshot for the D+Q bone RCT.

inputs.summary: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 source snapshot for NCT04313634; current API payload hash matched the recorded content hash before artifact retention.
Public-registry source-rights record allowing retained raw payload, normalized markdown, section index, structured extraction, and artifact manifests.
Accepting supervisor-agent source-fidelity review for the source-rights candidate.
Registry text-snapshot importer used to fetch, hash-check, normalize, and write retained artifacts.

outputs.summary: Created a submitted text-snapshot candidate, updated the ClinicalTrials.gov source_snapshot with access policy and raw_storage path, and created the first retained text_snapshot record with raw JSON, normalized markdown, section index, and SHA-256 artifact hashes.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the retained registry text artifact change set and required review lanes.
Records public_registry access policy and raw_storage path for the retained ClinicalTrials.gov payload.
Creates the retained raw payload, normalized markdown, section index, parser metadata, and artifact hashes for registry-text reuse.

quality_checks.summary: The current ClinicalTrials.gov API payload SHA-256 matched source_snapshot.content_sha256 before raw artifact retention.
The source_rights record allows raw_payload, normalized_markdown, section_index, structured_extraction, content_hash, and provenance_locator artifact classes for this public_registry source.
The text_snapshot record stores SHA-256 hashes for raw JSON, normalized markdown, and section-index JSON artifacts.
npm run verify:knowledge-base passed after text-snapshot ingestion and export refresh.

next_actions: Run source_fidelity and extraction_fidelity supervisor reviews for the text-snapshot candidate before promotion.
Use the normalized registry markdown as the preferred input for future registry extraction-refresh workers.
